hooks.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"KeyGate enforces 3 personal skills:
1. caveman (full mode) — terse responses, no filler. Code/commits stay normal.
2. superpowers — invoke matching skill before acting (brainstorming, writing-plans, executing-plans, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification-before-completion).
3. graphify — read FINAL_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md before architecture questions. Use graphify query/path/explain instead of grep for cross-module questions."}}'

jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'git commit|git push' && { cd "$PWD"; MATCHES=$(git grep -rl 'OEM Activation System' -- '*.php' '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.json' '*.ps1' '*.cmd' '*.md' '*.yml' 2>/dev/null | head -10); if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"⚠️ Old branding found! Files still containing 'OEM Activation System': $(echo $MATCHES | tr '\n' ', '). Please rename to KeyGate.\"}"; fi; } || true
FP=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$FP" in *FINAL_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM*) echo "$FP" >> /tmp/keygate_graph_dirty 2>/dev/null ;; esac; true

if [ -s /tmp/keygate_graph_dirty ]; then COUNT=$(wc -l < /tmp/keygate_graph_dirty); rm -f /tmp/keygate_graph_dirty; (cd "$PWD" && command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1 && graphify update FINAL_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM > /tmp/keygate_graph.log 2>&1 &) ; echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"\ud83d\udd04 graphify: $COUNT code file(s) changed \u2014 graph rebuild started in background.\"}"; fi; true

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f FINAL_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists at FINAL_PRODUCTION_SYSTEM/graphify-out/. Read GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files. Or run: graphify query \"<question>\" / graphify explain \"<symbol>\" / graphify path \"<A>\" \"<B>\"."}}'   || true ;; esac
